description:
Concentration Music | Deep Focus with Sitar

You sat down to work twenty minutes ago. You've checked your phone four times, refreshed Slack, opened a tab, closed it, opened another. Your coffee's cold.

This is for that.

Twenty minutes of acoustic sitar — no layered tones, no frequency tricks, no binaural science. Just one instrument played slowly, made to stay out of your way while you actually do the thing.

The sitar's natural pacing works opposite to most focus music. Where playlists try to push you forward with rising tempos and beats, this asks you to slow down to its speed. That's where the work happens.

Best for the early work block, the morning ritual, or any twenty minutes you keep losing to your own attention.

🎵 ABOUT THIS MUSIC
Instrument: Sitar (Indian classical string)
Style: Free-form sitar, focused mood
Frequency: None — pure acoustic, no Hz tuning
Binaural: None
Mood: Steady, grounded, gently engaging
Duration: 20 minutes

🎧 HOW TO USE
Put on headphones. Pick one task. Don't switch.

You don't need to focus on the music. This works in the background — close enough to keep you grounded, distant enough to let your work happen. If twenty minutes isn't enough, loop it.

Best experienced at your desk, in the early hours, with notifications silenced.

⏱ Chapters
00:00 — Settling
07:00 — Deeper focus
15:00 — Flow state
20:00 — Close

⏱ BEST FOR
- Concentration music for deep work
- Focus music for studying
- Morning productivity rituals
- ADHD focus and attention training
- Reading, writing, coding sessions
- Replacing distracting background noise
- Twenty-minute Pomodoro blocks
- Quiet morning routines before the day starts
- Sitar music for concentration
- Indian classical focus music

If twenty minutes brought you back to focus, subscribe for more concentration sessions and Indian classical instrumental music.

— Raga Focus

thumbnail_prompt: Pichwai/Kangra miniature painting style — ornate floral border, aged parchment background, Indian classical musician playing sitar seated cross-legged, dawn light, lotus flowers, peacocks, warm golden tones. Teal serif overlay text. 16:9 aspect ratio.

production_spec.note: Attenuate ~0.7dB to hit -14 LUFS target before export

ab_test_goal: Learn which audience pool converts better — cognitive focus seekers (concentration music) vs morning productivity seekers (morning music). Track impressions + CTR + AVD% separately for A and B.
strategic_bet: Coffee-shop energy sitar fills the concentration music pool with Indian classical — differentiates from western ambient/electronic competitors
